title: AgentOrchestrator — wires dispatcher, store, chat panel into App.tsx
evidence: Adapters for store API mismatches: addComponentToLayout item->(name,version,size), setTimeRange preset->{start,end}, setFilter limited to ScalarFilterKey
Themes sourced from useTheme().availableThemes (not hardcoded array)
Store event handlers use useFrameStore.getState() (safe for event handlers)
App.tsx updated to render AgentOrchestrator alongside FrameLayout
notes: Store actions from getState() to avoid stale closure re-renders in event handlers.
